positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a mystical celestial whale swimming through a nebula-filled cosmic ocean. The whale has bioluminescent accents and gentle, flowing fins. The nebula background features deep indigo, sapphire blue, and sparkling magenta gas clouds, contrasted with crisp starlight. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, designed for a clean, impactful print on clothing. Clean silhouettes are paramount. Style: Neo-Art Deco, Japanese Ukiyo-e influences mixed with modern vector art. Lighting: Dramatic internal glow from the whale and nebula, creating high contrast. Details: Minimalist yet rich textures, optimized for screen printing.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, ugly, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, signature-like, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, celebrity likenesses
